title: x2 125g each Baby Nappy Cream 125g x 2 Pack – Fragrance-Free Barrier Cream for Skin Prone to Nappy Rash – Moisturising Nappy Rash Treatment for Babies & Adults by GBH
features: Forms a gentle, protective layer—suitable as a daily nappy rash cream for babies and nappy rash cream for adults.
Fragrance-free and dermatologically tested, ideal baby cream for nappy rash and newborn care.
Helps moisturise and condition skin with zinc and castor oil cream ingredients in a non-greasy formula.
A reliable option for those seeking alternatives to sudocrem 125g, sudocream, or sudacrem.
Developed for skin prone to nappy rash, suitable for those looking for a mild, everyday nappy cream.
description: Product description Forms a gentle, protective layer—suitable as a daily nappy rash cream for babies and nappy rash cream for adults to apply babies whilst changing nappies. Fragrance-free and dermatologically tested, ideal baby cream for nappy rash and newborn care. Helps moisturise and condition skin with zinc and castor oil cream ingredients in a non-greasy formula. A reliable option for those seeking alternatives to sudocrem 125g each x2 pack, sudocream, or sudacrem. Developed for skin prone to nappy rash, suitable for those looking for a mild, everyday nappy cream. Safety Warning For external use only. Keep out of reach of children.
